revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:走水神社 (神戸市)); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:55, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/20050368 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:55, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:走水神社 (神戸市) | revid=20050368 --> ''この記事の初版は[http://blog.goo.ne.jp/kimmy_v-kobe/c/a6be438fc249b35304263d758692db8b]の著作権者によるものであることが確認されています。--[[利用者:Miya|miya]] 2006年1月26日 (木) 22:31 (UTC)'' ----

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:55, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/20050368 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:55, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:走水神社 (神戸市) | revid=20050368 --> ''この記事の初版は[http://blog.goo.ne.jp/kimmy_v-kobe/c/a6be438fc249b35304263d758692db8b]の著作権者によるものであることが確認されています。--[[User:Miya|miya]] 2006年1月26日 (木) 22:31 (UTC)'' ----

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hashirimizu_Shrine_%28Kobe%29 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hashirimizu_Shrine_%28Kobe%29 for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:55, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/20050368 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:55, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:走水神社 (神戸市) | revid=20050368 --> ''この記事の初版は[http://blog.goo.ne.jp/kimmy_v-kobe/c/a6be438fc249b35304263d758692db8b]の著作権者によるものであることが確認されています。--[[User:Miya|miya]] 2006年1月26日 (木) 22:31 (UTC)'' ----
